title: Polish Cod with Silky Salad
description: A delicate Polish-inspired dish featuring pan-seared cod with a silky salad made from fresh vegetables.
instructions: 2. Season cod with salt and pepper. Pan-sear in olive oil until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. Meanwhile, toast Polish rye bread until crispy.
4. In a separate pan, sauté shredded carrots and pickled beets until tender.
5. Combine salad leaves, cooked carrots and beets in a bowl.
6. Serve cod on top of the salad with toasted rye bread on the side.
7. Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil and serve immediately.
